name: CoSchedule
description:
Great for small teams and agencies, CoSchedule keeps the trains running on time. Phenomenal organizational abilities and workflow management tools make it a best-in-class tool, more than worthy of standing up to Hootsuite. 

Hootsuite vs. CoSchedule

  1. Customer service and support: the support team is helpful and gets back to users quickly, unlike Hootsuite where support is often lacking
  2. Reporting and analytics: CoSchedule’s reporting capabilities focus on content marketing and campaign performance, making it great for teams with an overarching vision. However, you may not get the same depth of insights that you do with Hootsuite
  3. Reliability: CoSchedule has a reputation for dependability and performance, making it a favorite among teams of all sizes
  4. Integrations: with a unique marketing calendar, Canva integration, and AI content generator, CoSchedule allows you room to experiment and play. While Hootsuite has more integrations across the board, bigger isn’t always better.
  5. Platform usability: with a streamlined approach to content planning, creation, and distribution, CoSchedule is beloved as an all-in-one solution to marketing management
  6. User interface: users particularly love CoSchedule’s visually-forward marketing calendar
  7. Pricing: CoSchedule’s pricing starts at $80 per month

Features to Note

  • Collaborative workflows make it easy to work with your team
  • Scheduling capabilities let you build unrivaled content calendars
  • Manage comments and DMs with CoSchedule’s social inbox
  • The ReQueue feature will fill your queue with content based on your successful posts
  • Campaign templates help you create and execute your strategy for world domination
  • White-labeled reports make it simple to share your wins with clients
  • Impress clients with read-only calendars where they can review, comment on, and view your planned posts

It’s a toss-up between the two platforms, but teams that want a comprehensive marketing tool may be more suited to CoSchedule. With an amazing platform that combines content marketing, social media scheduling, and project management into one, it changes the game when it comes to planning and implementation. 

‍
